examples: The taxman will levy surtax on the waxworks.
The vehicle purchase tax is derived from vehicle purchase surtax.
See Janet Novack, Three Senators Call For Billionaire Estate Surtax, Forbes.com, June 24, 2010.
The 3.8% surtax on investment income for taxpayers, estates and trusts became effective January 1, 2013.
However, income from muni bonds doesn't count as investment income when calculating the surtax.
